pi_items.source: Task verification scripts (export_result.sh) and setup scripts check and clean this specific file path.
Environment setup script (setup_artifactory.sh) and task_utils.sh define ADMIN_USER='admin'.
Environment setup script (setup_artifactory.sh) and task_utils.sh define ADMIN_PASS='password' and initialize the Artifactory admin password with it.

privileged_info_summary: The Artifactory administration panel is accessible at http://localhost:8082 using the credentials 'admin' and 'password'. The generated system report must be saved to /home/ga/system_report.txt.
